name: OpenClaw ExchangeRate
description: Exchange rate lookup and currency conversion tool powered by ExchangeRate-API.

apiKey.label: ExchangeRate-API Key
apiKey.help: API key for ExchangeRate-API requests (fallback: EXCHANGERATE_API_KEY env var).

baseUrl.label: ExchangeRate API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Optional ExchangeRate-API base URL override. Defaults to https://v6.exchangerate-api.com/v6.
